Description: Unique identifier for the MSME borrower.

Range/Values: Retail, Manufacturing, Construction, Technology, Agriculture, Textile
Description: The industrial sector the borrower operates in.

Range/Values: Term Loan, Working Capital, Trade Credit
Description: The type of credit facility assigned to the borrower.
Working capital credit line utilization trend. Higher values indicate higher default risk.
Debt-to-income ratio. Higher values indicate higher default risk.
Revenue consistency score. Lower values indicate higher default risk.
GST filing regularity score. Lower compliance indicates higher default risk.
Cashflow pressure index. Higher values indicate higher default risk.
Sanctioned working capital line draw percentage. Higher usage indicates higher default risk.
Month-on-Month revenue trend index. Lower values (declining revenue) raise default risk.
Overall credit payment history compliance score. Lower scores raise default risk.
Flag indicating active delays in paying creditors or suppliers.
NLP stress score extracted from credit officer notes. Higher scores indicate higher stress/risk.
Target label indicating if the borrower defaulted / entered NPA status.
